productDisplayName: Doodle Kids Girls Polka Dot Black Dress
description: Composition Blue and black polka dots sleeveless dress, made of a blended fabric, has a round neck layered top made of 100% cotton, net from the waist down layered over inner linings, net pleated at the waist with a rose embellishment, zipped closure at the back and a netted sash This dress comes with a pearl necklace Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Flat dry Cool iron do not iron on decorations Every mother loves to dress up her bundle of joy as a little princess. This dress from doodle will make your little one look like a miniature version of the princess in the fairy tales you read to put her to sleep. Pair it with pretty sandals and a cute hair-band.
